sponsors.name: John's Plumbing
sponsors.product_description: If those laxatives were a mistake, then call John's plumbing
sponsors.script: A peaceful protest led by a group of Speech-Language Pathologists in Washington, D.C. has turned bloody in the past few hours with the leader, an S.L.P. named Katelyn Martino, exchanging blows with D.C. police officers. Their protest stemmed with a proposed code change to their profession that the profession as a whole is not taking lightly. After her arrest, Katelyn has announced she would gladly rot in jail before allowing this to go unnoticed.

sponsors.name: Blockbuster
sponsors.script: This show wouldn't be possible without our partners at Blockbuster.  Blockbuster is the place to go if you are looking for a great VHS or DVD to watch tonight. Mention this show and get one additional night on us!

sponsors.name: Mohawk Airlines
sponsors.script: A big "thank you" to Mohawk Airlines. Are you flying from Cincinatti to Debuke, or maybe Cincinatti to Wapakoneta? Either way, if you find yourself needing to fly somewhere in the midwest from Cincinatti, consider Mohawk Airlines.
